text: We lost 13 of our finest from the Lebanese state security forces in a direct attack on a government building owned by the Ministry of Interior and the Lebanese government The Lebanese president Aoun and Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf avenged their blood by talking to their killers, the Israelis against all laws and norms and everything Two days after a grave massacre against Lebanese civilians, killing and injuring 2,000 Tarhini, Malah, Harb, Ayoub, Qanso, Fakih, Haidar, Reslan, Dawi, Bdier, Meqdad, and Hijazi
text_zh: 我们在黎巴嫩内政部和黎巴嫩政府拥有的政府大楼遭到直接袭击时，失去了13名最优秀的黎巴嫩国家安全部队成员。黎巴嫩总统奥恩和黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫通过与他们的杀手——以色列人交谈，违背了所有法律、准则和一切原则，为他们报了仇。在针对黎巴嫩平民的严重屠杀发生两天后，造成了2000人伤亡，其中包括Tarhini、Malah、Harb、Ayoub、Qanso、Fakih、Haidar、Reslan、Dawi、Bdier、Meqdad和Hijazi。

text: Khaldeh,1982
text_zh: 卡尔德，1982年

text: ELINT News RT @julianbarnes : US Officials: Iran cannot find all the mines they laid in the Strait of Hormuz and so cannot open up the waterway further. tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @julianbarnes：美国官员：伊朗无法找到他们在霍尔木兹海峡布设的所有水雷，因此无法进一步开放该水道。推文

text: ELINT News RT @FSeifikaran : Exclusive report by Al Jazeera shows parts of the wreckage of two Iranian Su-24 fighter jets that were shot down by Qatari Air Force, March 2. The bodies of the Iranian pilots have not yet been found. https://twitter.com/FSeifikaran/status/2042760175593890092/video/1 tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @FSeifikaran：半岛电视台的独家报道显示了3月2日被卡塔尔空军击落的两架伊朗苏-24战斗机的残骸碎片。伊朗飞行员的遗体尚未找到。https://twitter.com/FSeifikaran/status/2042760175593890092/video/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Iran has been unable to open Hormuz to more shipping traffic, partially because it cannot locate all of the naval mines it laid in the strait -NYT https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2042764195003847132/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 伊朗一直无法开放霍尔木兹海峡以增加航运交通，部分原因是它无法定位在海峡中布设的所有海军水雷 -《纽约时报》 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2042764195003847132/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Another view of the crew module of the Artemis II mission floating, as they continue to work to establish communications and finish power-down procedures. All four crew members are safe and healthy. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042762867217187165/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 另一张阿尔忒弥斯2号任务乘员舱漂浮的视图，他们继续努力建立通信并完成断电程序。所有四名机组人员都安全健康。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042762867217187165/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender The first of the recovery team fast boats has now arrived at the splashdown location of the crew module. Issues with the onboard communications system seem to be ongoing but, they can hear the crew inside. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042760159785591289/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 第一艘救援队快艇现已抵达乘员舱的溅落点。机载通信系统似乎仍有问题，但他们可以听到里面的机组人员的声音。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042760159785591289/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 The Artemis II crew has returned to Earth with a successful splashdown off the coast of San Diego after their 10-day lunar flyby mission. https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2042758654080815145/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 阿尔忒弥斯2号机组人员在完成为期10天的绕月飞行任务后，在圣地亚哥海岸成功溅落，返回地球。https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2042758654080815145/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Artemis II crew back on Earth after successful splashdown in Pacific Ocean off coast of California, completing the farthest space mission in history. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042757871230681319/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 阿尔忒弥斯2号机组人员在加利福尼亚海岸外的太平洋成功溅落后返回地球，完成了历史上最遥远的太空任务。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042757871230681319/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor From nearly 250,000 miles away to a pinpoint splashdown, watch Artemis II return home from humanity’s first crewed mission beyond low Earth orbit in over 50 years. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042757780084265415/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 从近25万英里外到精准溅落，观看阿尔忒弥斯2号从人类50多年来首次载人近地轨道以外的任务中返回家园。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042757780084265415/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Communication checks have been successfully completed as the module uprights systems are working. GREAT NEWS! https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042757573850333587/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 通信检查已成功完成，因为舱体直立系统正在工作。好消息！https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042757573850333587/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender The crew module has now successfully splashed down in the Pacific Ocean following its reentry from space. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042756956742365357/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 乘员舱在从太空重返大气层后，现已成功溅落在太平洋中。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042756956742365357/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender All three main parachutes of the crew module have now deployed. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042756202149412903/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 乘员舱的所有三个主降落伞现已展开。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042756202149412903/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Communication reestablished with Artemis II crew after re-entering Earth's atmosphere. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042756078220259484/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 阿尔忒弥斯2号机组人员在重返地球大气层后恢复通信。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042756078220259484/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender The blackout period is now over as boats are now moving to the splashdown point. Communication check is now complete as communication has been established. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042755102981620067/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 停电期现已结束，船只正在向溅落点移动。通信检查现已完成，通信已建立。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042755102981620067/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor As expected, communications have been lost as the Artemis crew makes re-entry. It's expected to last about 6 minutes. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042754445130260575/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 正如预期的那样，随着阿尔忒弥斯机组人员重返大气层，通信中断。预计持续约6分钟。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042754445130260575/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender The crew module has now started its reentry into the Earth’s atmosphere. A 6 minute blackout period is now in effect. A P-3 Orion aircraft has now acquired the trajectory of the reentry vehicle. Time until splashdown is now 9 minutes and 35 seconds. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042754155928801316/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 乘员舱现已开始重返地球大气层。6分钟的通信中断期现已生效。一架P-3猎户座飞机现已获取了重返飞行器的轨迹。距离溅落还有9分35秒。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042754155928801316/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Artemis II crew re-enters Earth's atmosphere. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042753502858891406/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 阿尔忒弥斯2号机组人员重返地球大气层。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042753502858891406/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran hasn't been able to open the Strait of Hormuz to more shipping traffic because it cannot locate all of the mines it laid in the waterway and lacks the capability to remove them, according to NYT, citing U.S. officials. ➡️ The "safe routes" announced by the IRGC are limited in large part because Iran mined the strait haphazardly, U.S. officials said. ➡️ The officials say it is unclear whether Iran accurately tracked the location of every mine it deployed in the Strait of Hormuz, and even when positions were recorded, some mines may have drifted or shifted over time. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 据《纽约时报》援引美国官员的话称，伊朗一直无法开放霍尔木兹海峡以增加航运交通，因为它无法定位在水道中布设的所有水雷，且缺乏清除它们的能力。➡️ 伊斯兰革命卫队宣布的“安全路线”在很大程度上受到限制，因为伊朗在海峡中随意布设了水雷，美国官员说。➡️ 官员们表示，目前尚不清楚伊朗是否准确追踪了其在霍尔木兹海峡部署的每一枚水雷的位置，即使记录了位置，一些水雷也可能随时间漂移或移动。推文

text: U.S. Central Command The crew of a U.S. Air Force C-130 prepare to transport cargo while operating in the U.S. Central Command area of responsibility. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2042752230948823192/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 美国空军C-130机组人员准备在美军中央司令部责任区内执行货运任务。https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2042752230948823192/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Watch the service module separate from Integrity at 20,000 MPH as the Artemis crew is just minutes from splashing down back on Earth. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042749863301877806/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 观看服务舱以每小时2万英里的速度与“完整号”（Integrity）分离，阿尔忒弥斯机组人员距离溅落回地球仅剩几分钟。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042749863301877806/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Footage shows the crew module separating from the service module, as the Artemis II crew begin their descent. The 19 second firing of the thrusters prior to reentry into Earth’s atmosphere has been completed as well. The correct angle for reentry and minimal exposure to high temperatures for reentry has also been completed. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 视频显示乘员舱与服务舱分离，阿尔忒弥斯2号机组人员开始下降。重返地球大气层前的19秒推进器点火也已完成。重返大气层的正确角度和最小化高温暴露也已完成。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 CNN: High-stakes negotiations between the U.S. and Iran in Islamabad on Saturday are expected to begin indirectly before shifting to direct talks later in the day. Officials said both sides will likely first agree on the agenda through Pakistani mediators, before moving to face-to-face discussions as diplomacy progresses. @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇵🇰 The New York Times: Iran has been unable to locate all of the mines it laid in the Strait of Hormuz, which has prevented the country from quickly complying with President Trump's demand to allow more ships to pass through the waterway. Iranian negotiators and a US delegation led by Vice President JD Vance are set to meet in Pakistan for peace talks, which may be complicated by the issue of the mines in the strait. The Iranian Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps has issued warnings that ships could collide with sea mines, and has published charts showing safe routes, which are limited due to the haphazard mining of the strait. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇵🇰 《纽约时报》：伊朗一直无法定位其在霍尔木兹海峡布设的所有水雷，这使得该国无法迅速遵守特朗普总统关于允许更多船只通过该水道的要求。伊朗谈判代表和由副总统JD·万斯率领的美国代表团定于在巴基斯坦举行和平谈判，这可能会因海峡水雷问题而变得复杂。伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队已发出警告称船只可能与水雷相撞，并发布了显示安全路线的图表，但由于海峡布雷混乱，这些路线非常有限。@wfwitness

text: — 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 / 🇵🇰 NEW: Professor Mohammad Marandi, famous for his high-intensity interviews and debates with Western media outlets, seems to be part of the Iranian delegation in Islamabad Marandi previously served as an advisor to Iranian nuclear negotiators for the JCPOA. @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 / 🇵🇰 新消息：以与西方媒体进行高强度采访和辩论而闻名的Mohammad Marandi教授似乎是伊斯兰堡伊朗代表团的一员。Marandi此前曾担任伊朗核谈判代表的JCPOA顾问。@Middle_East_Spectator

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ : U.S. intelligence assessments indicate Iran still has thousands of ballistic missiles and could retrieve launchers from underground storage areas, contradicting U.S. Defence Secretary Hegseth’s claim that Iran’s missile programme is “functionally destroyed”. While more than half of launchers have been destroyed or trapped, many can be repaired or dug out. Iran’s missile inventory has been roughly halved but still numbers in the thousands. Iran also retains a small inventory of cruise missiles. Some officials are concerned Tehran will use the ceasefire to reconstitute its arsenal. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ：美国情报评估显示，伊朗仍拥有数千枚弹道导弹，并可以从地下储存区取回发射器，这与美国国防部长赫格塞斯声称伊朗导弹计划“功能性摧毁”的说法相矛盾。虽然超过一半的发射器已被摧毁或被困，但许多可以修复或挖掘出来。伊朗的导弹库存大约减半，但仍有数千枚。伊朗还保留了少量巡航导弹。一些官员担心德黑兰会利用停火来重建其武库。@wfwitness

text: Muhoozi Kainerugaba, Uganda’s military chief: We are going to end ALL diplomatic relations with Türkiye in the next 30 days if they do not address our issues!
text_zh: 乌干达军事首长Muhoozi Kainerugaba：如果土耳其在未来30天内不解决我们的问题，我们将终止与土耳其的所有外交关系！

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: In the upcoming negotiations, if the American side is ready for a real agreement and to grant the rights of the Iranian nation, they will see readiness for an agreement on our side as well. However, in the current conflict, we have shown them that if they intend to use negotiations as a futile show or a deceptive operation, we are prepared to secure our rights through faith in God and reliance on the capabilities of our nation.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫：在即将到来的谈判中，如果美方准备好达成真正的协议并给予伊朗民族权利，他们也会看到我们达成协议的意愿。然而，在当前的冲突中，我们已经向他们表明，如果他们打算将谈判作为徒劳的表演或欺骗性行动，我们准备通过信仰上帝和依靠我们民族的能力来捍卫我们的权利。

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: Unfortunately, our experience with negotiations with the Americans has always been accompanied by failure and breach of commitments. Twice within less than a year, in the middle of negotiations-despite the goodwill of the Iranian side-they attacked us and committed numerous war crimes. We have goodwill, but we do not have trust.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫：不幸的是，我们与美国人谈判的经验总是伴随着失败和违背承诺。在不到一年的时间里，在谈判过程中——尽管伊朗方面表现出善意——他们两次袭击了我们并犯下了无数战争罪行。我们有善意，但我们没有信任。

text: 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese and Israeli diplomats spoke by phone Friday and are planning to meet next week to discuss a ceasefire, the office of Lebanese President Joseph Aoun said in a social media post. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩办公室在社交媒体上发文称，黎巴嫩和以色列外交官周五进行了通话，并计划下周会面讨论停火。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 Ghalibaf at Islamabad Airport: Our experience negotiating with the United States has always been marked by failure and broken promises / We have goodwill, but no trust The Speaker of Parliament, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, upon arrival in Islamabad and in response to journalists’ questions about recent remarks by U.S. Vice President Vance, said: ➡️ Unfortunately, our experience in negotiations with the United States has consistently been one of failure and broken commitments. Twice within less than a year, in the middle of negotiations—and despite Iran’s goodwill—we were attacked, and multiple war crimes were committed. ➡️ We have goodwill, but we do not have trust. ➡️ In the upcoming negotiations, if the American side is ready for a genuine agreement and to grant the rights of the Iranian people, they will see readiness from us as well. However, in the current conflict, we have shown them that if they intend to use negotiations as a futile show or a deceptive tactic, we are prepared to secure our rights through faith in God and reliance on the strength of our nation. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 卡利巴夫在伊斯兰堡机场：我们与美国谈判的经验总是以失败和违背承诺为标志 / 我们有善意，但没有信任。议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫在抵达伊斯兰堡时，在回答记者关于美国副总统万斯最近言论的问题时说：➡️ 不幸的是，我们在与美国谈判中的经验一直都是失败和违背承诺的。在不到一年的时间里，在谈判过程中——尽管伊朗表现出善意——我们遭到了袭击，并犯下了多起战争罪行。➡️ 我们有善意，但我们没有信任。➡️ 在即将到来的谈判中，如果美方准备好达成真正的协议并给予伊朗人民权利，他们也会看到我们的意愿。然而，在当前的冲突中，我们已经向他们表明，如果他们打算将谈判作为徒劳的表演或欺骗性策略，我们准备通过信仰上帝和依靠我们民族的力量来捍卫我们的权利。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding across 2 regions in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Upper Galilee @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部2个地区响起红色警报：• 对抗线 • 上加利利 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 Children of Minab traveling with the Iranian delegation, led by Dr. Ghalibaf. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇮🇷 Personal belongings left behind by the children, stained with their blood, were taken by the Iranian delegation “Minab 168” to Pakistan as evidence of a U.S. war crime against Iran, and as a symbol of their demand for justice in potential upcoming negotiations. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 在卡利巴夫博士率领下，随伊朗代表团旅行的米纳布（Minab）儿童。🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇮🇷 伊朗代表团将孩子们留下的、沾满鲜血的个人物品“Minab 168”带到巴基斯坦，作为美国对伊朗战争罪行的证据，并作为他们在未来潜在谈判中要求正义的象征。🔴 @DDGeopolitics
